description: Your SOC team is suffering from alert fatigue due to uniform handling of SSH brute-force attempts. Build a dynamic risk-scoring engine in Splunk to prioritize high-value targets. Log in to Splunk at http://localhost:8000 (username: 'admin', password: 'SplunkAdmin1!'). Using the 'security_logs' index, calculate a total risk score per 'src_ip' based on failed login attempts, assigning 100 points for 'root', 50 for 'admin', and 10 for all other users. Filter for source IPs with a total risk score strictly greater than 500. Save the results as a Report named 'Dynamic_IP_Risk_Scoring' and create a scheduled Alert named 'High_Risk_IP_Detected' configured to run hourly (cron: '0 * * * *').
